## Phase Boundary

Item recommendations are anchored by a team-level win condition statement that classifies how the draft wins, frames the overall strategy, and accounts for the enemy team's macro plan. Mixed backend+frontend phase: backend classifies draft archetypes and feeds Claude win condition context, frontend displays the strategy statement prominently.
